prompt_text: Open source or affordable ATS tools instead of Greenhouse
response:
# Open Source & Affordable ATS Alternatives to Greenhouse

## Free/Open Source Options

### **Open Source**
- **OpenCATS** - Self-hosted, basic but functional
- **Recruitment** - Django-based, lightweight
- **Odoo Recruitment** - Part of Odoo ERP suite (free tier available)
- **Taiga** - Project management but can track candidates

### **Freemium (Limited Free Tier)**
- **Zoho Recruit** - Free for up to 2 users
- **Workable** - Free for 1 active job posting
- **BambooHR** - Free tier for very small teams

## Budget-Friendly Paid Options

| Tool | Starting Price | Best For |
|------|---|---|
| **Lever** | ~$500/mo | Mid-market, modern UX |
| **JazzHR** | ~$50/mo | Small businesses, simplicity |
| **Freshteam** | ~$60/mo | Startups, integrated HR |
| **Ashby** | ~$900/mo | Growth-stage (design-focused) |
| **Lattice** | ~$10/mo per user | Performance + recruiting combo |

## DIY/Spreadsheet Tools
- **Airtable** + Zapier integration (~$20/mo)
- **Google Forms** + Sheets automation (free)
- **Notion** templates ($10/mo team)

## Key Considerations
- **Self-hosting** saves $ but requires maintenance
- **SMB tools** often lack advanced reporting Greenhouse has
- **Integration needs** (email, Slack, LinkedIn) matter for total cost

**What's your team size & main need?** (high volume, specific integrations, etc.) I can narrow recommendations.
